case_title: BRUCE MCCORMACK ET AL VS. APOLLO RETAIL SPECIALIST LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-05-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. CLERICAL MISCOMMUNICATION - GIVEN THE BENEFIT OF THE DOUBT AND CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,252.00 FILED BY MCCORMACK, BRUCE MCCORMACK, DEIRDRE AS TO DEFENDANT APOLLO RETAIL SPECIALIST LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
